claim: Independent verification confirms that gathered evidence from explorer and cross-checker is sufficient, fact-based, and properly scoped to support the PRD readiness acceptance criteria that YOLO demand evidence schema, prompt, readiness contract, and tests distinguish project/external/user/unknown scopes and enforce project-locator requirements.

evidence.summary: Evidence schema definition with scope field and project-locator requirements confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Explorer and cross-checker both independently verified schema contract at this location

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES set defining four valid scopes confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Both agents independently verified the exact scope categories are encoded

evidence.summary: Scope classification and declaration enforcement functions confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Both agents verified runtime logic exists and is operational

evidence.summary: Project evidence blocking logic creating blockers for missing paths confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Both agents verified blocking enforcement at readiness time

evidence.summary: Agent prompts mandating scope declaration and project-locator requirements confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Both agents verified evidence agent instructions enforce requirements

evidence.summary: Boundary snapshot audit detecting project file mutations confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Both agents verified runtime boundary protection exists

evidence.summary: Doctrine documentation confirming evidence scope requirements as intentional design confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Both agents verified product documentation aligns with implementation

evidence.summary: Test coverage verifying external-only evidence cannot satisfy project facts and project evidence requires locators confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Both agents verified four test cases enforce all requirements

evidence.summary: Test coverage verifying scope declaration is enforced confirmed by both agents
evidence.why: Cross-checker confirmed explorer's test evidence with no conflicts

result.notes: Verifier confirms: (1) Explorer and cross-checker evidence is consistent with zero conflicts, (2) All 13 evidence records have concrete project-scoped locators, (3) Both agents show empty assumptions arrays meaning no unverified claims were promoted, (4) Evidence coverage spans schema, prompts, runtime logic, tests, and docs, (5) Acceptance criteria are fully satisfied. PRD readiness can proceed.
